transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Have you started going to the campus fitness center this semester?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. I'm trying to exercise regularly before my evening classes.

questions.prompt: Why is the man going to the fitness center?

choices.text: To register for a health course.
